info.title: Store API Documentation
info.description: Store API Postman and Code definitions documentation.

post.description: Receives Stripe webhook events. Verifies signature. Handles: `checkout.session.completed`, `checkout.session.expired`, `charge.refunded`. **No authentication required** — secured by Stripe signature.

get.description: Get address autocomplete suggestions using Google Places API proxy.

parameters.name: session
parameters.description: Session UUID to link related autocomplete and details requests

get.description: Get normalized address details for a specific place_id using Google Places API proxy.

parameters.name: session
parameters.description: Session UUID to link related autocomplete and details requests

get.description: Paginated list of order cancellation requests. Filter by `status` (pending/accepted/rejected).

post.description: Accept the request: cancel the order, restock variants, and email the user.
Reject the request. Order is left untouched. An email with the admin note is sent to the user.

admin_note.example: Your order has already been dispatched and cannot be cancelled.

get.description: List all categories for admin

post.description: Create a new category. Send as **multipart/form-data** to support image file uploads.

get.description: Get a specific category for admin

post.description: Update an existing category. Send as **multipart/form-data** and include `_method=PATCH` field to support file uploads.

_method.description: Method override required for multipart PATCH

post.description: Reorder categories

get.description: List all contact messages for admin
Show a single contact message. This action automatically marks a 'new' status message as 'read'.

patch.description: Update the status and optionally internal notes of a contact message.

get.description: Get general statistics for the admin dashboard
Returns geo-location data for the caller's IP address. Reads Cloudflare's `CF-IPCountry` header first (zero cost). Falls back to **ipapi.co** when the header is absent.
List all phone leads/subscribers for admin
Show a single inspired lead details.

put.description: Update the status, notes, or info of a lead.

get.description: List all orders with filtering
Show details of a specific order

post.description: Transition order status or payment status
Issue a full Stripe refund for a paid order and mark it as refunded.

get.description: List all products for admin, paginated

post.description: Create a new product. Send as **multipart/form-data** to support image file uploads.

images[].description: One or more image files (jpg/png/webp). Max 5 MB each.

get.description: Show a single product's details

post.description: Update an existing product. Send as **multipart/form-data** and include `_method=PATCH` field (required because browsers/HTTP clients don't support file uploads with PATCH).

_method.description: Method override required for multipart PATCH

images[].description: New image files to replace existing ones (jpg/png/webp). Max 5 MB each. Omit to keep existing images.

get.description: Get all reviews with filters. Admin only.
Get a single review by ID. Admin only.

delete.description: Permanently delete a review. Admin only.

patch.description: Approve or reject a review. Updates product rating automatically.

post.description: Generate a preview SKU for a product or variant based on the provided details. Does NOT reserve or persist the SKU.

get.description: Get logged HTTP requests from Telescope
Get logged database queries from Telescope
Get logged exceptions from Telescope
Get logged queue jobs from Telescope
Get logged application logs from Telescope
Get logged events from Telescope
Get logged emails from Telescope
Get logged notifications from Telescope
Get logged cache operations from Telescope
Get a summary count and latest entry of all monitored Telescope types
List all users with their orders and reviews counts
Get full user details
View a specific user's wishlist
View all addresses of a specific user for admin
Returns all products sorted by their current wishlist count
Enhanced summary stats with week-over-week trend data
Products trending by wishlist adds in the last N days
Products with wishlist-to-purchase conversion data

post.description: Register a new user
Authenticate a user and return a token

get.description: Returns the currently authenticated user's profile

put.description: Update the authenticated user's profile information. All fields are optional.

post.description: Log out the authenticated user

all.description: If true, logs out from all devices

post.description: Refresh the current authentication token
Send a password reset token to the given email
Reset user password using token
Send OTP to user's email
Verify OTP sent to user
Login or register via a verified Google ID token. Handles account linking automatically.

id_token.description: Google ID token from client-side Google Sign-In

get.description: Get a list of active top-level categories, including their children
Get a single category by slug

post.description: Saves a new contact us message.

message.example: I have a question about my order.
Your message has been sent successfully.

post.description: Saves a new phone lead. If phone is already registered, returns a graceful success message.

message.example: Your phone number has been saved successfully.
Your phone number is already registered. We will be in touch!

get.description: Get a paginated list of the authenticated user's orders

post.description: Create a new order for the authenticated user

get.description: Get details of a specific order belonging to the user

post.description: Immediately cancel a **pending** order. Only allowed within **3 hours** of creation.

400.description: Cannot cancel order (wrong status or window expired)

post.description: Submit a cancellation request for an order. Cannot be used if order is shipped, delivered, or cancelled, or if a pending request already exists.

reason.example: I ordered by mistake and need to cancel.

get.description: Get a paginated list of published products with optional filters
Get full details of a published product by its slug
Get a paginated list of approved reviews for a specific product

post.description: Submit a review for a product. One review per user per product.

get.description: Get the authenticated user's review for a specific product

put.description: Update your own review. Edit window is 30 days from creation.

403.description: Not authorized or edit window expired

get.description: Return all products in the authenticated user's wishlist

post.description: Add a product to the user's wishlist

delete.description: Explicitly remove a product from the user's wishlist

get.summary: Check if product is in wishlist
get.description: Returns a boolean indicating if the product exists in wishlist
Returns the total count of items in the wishlist

CategoryBasic.title: CategoryBasic
CategoryBasic.description: Minimal category reference (used inside product listings)
